stemHtml: During an instrument approach, the autopilot (AP) is disconnected to fly the approach manually using the flight director (FD) command bars. What happens to the indications on the Flight Mode Annunciator (FMA) and what is the appropriate course of action by the pilot flying (PF)?

options.a: FMA changes to reflect manual flight mode, follow flight director guidance.
options.b: FMA indicates a fault, ignore them and follow flight director.
options.c: FMA remain unchanged, continue following autopilot guidance.
options.d: FMA disappear completely, rely solely on flight instruments for guidance.
